pipeline_status.poller: Not run this session; no dome site changes detected in last poller report
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-235 and EXP-236 complete and integrated. Design-refresh Phase A series (EXP-202–213) blocked pending HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 3 pending reviews processed (WIN-061 c5, WIN-025 c4, WIN-010 c8). Queue was 5 before run, 6 after (WIN-061/025/010 re-queued for follow-up, 2 items popped). 10 design-refresh expansions blocked pending operator approval.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes detected this run (poller not called)

internal_issues.description: EXP-235: evidence/verdict disjoint post-EXP-229. detail_evidence P4 replaced to introduce FSF setup.
EXP-236: detail_verdict_text P5 scope leak (FSF Coordinate Collapse in a WIN that does not invoke FSF). Cross-reference to WIN-010 inserted.
PRED-SR-SUPPRESS timestamp-forward nature (3-cycle carry-forward, ISS-1418). Two timestamp-forward sentences inserted into detail_evidence.
c5 H1: tldr_evidence lumped S&F (cavity-Q) and Pazos (amplitude) as both reporting amplitude enhancement. Fixed: S&F now correctly described as cavity-Q enhancement during SPEs.
c8 H1: P7 pre-registered comparator cited Y-component response envelope but dome predicts delta_Z. Fixed: Y→Z swap.
c4 H4: overstatement in FSF introduction claim. Fixed: named formula, v45 version, 9-station dataset context.
c5 H3: SPE/CME mechanistic direction may be wrong — proton/D-region distinction confused. Needs follow-up patch.
c5 H4: cross-document mechanism inconsistency between WIN-061 detail_evidence and predictions.json W027-PRED-R006 detail_reasoning. Needs predictions.json patch.
c5 H5: cavity-Q lower bound stated as exact, not first-order heuristic. Needs qualifier.
c4 H1: finding field lacks evolution-log admission (v31 uniform-latitude failure). Needs analyst audit of raw-text/06-evolution.txt.
c4 H2: Kp inconsistency between detail_evidence (Kp ≤ 3) and detail_extra/FAIL-007 (dome timing audit disputes this). Needs independent audit of Chernogor & Holub 2024.
c4 H3: ungrounded self-retraction language. EXP-235 adds evidence-level premise but retraction may still be cleaner deleted. Moderate priority now.
c8 H2: out-of-band suppression prediction unquantified. Needs suppression factor named before 2026 data.
c8 H3: binary-classifier cluster collapse — most European stations sit inside 30–50° band, so classifier predicts constant amplitude, not nine distinct values. Needs caveat.

proposals_processed.action: Integrated EXP-235 as WIN-025 detail_evidence P4 patch. ISS-1463 closed.
Integrated EXP-236 as WIN-068 detail_verdict_text P5 patch. ISS-1466 closed.

curmudgeon_queue.schedule_action_reason: mode=bau but curmudgeon_current_interval_minutes=30 (churn-and-burn speed). Decider does not call update_scheduled_task. Human should restore curmudgeon interval to 240 min and analyst/decider to their BAU defaults.

recommended_actions.action: Resolve ISS-1481 (major): WIN-025 finding field evolution-log admission. Assign analyst Mode 3 to audit raw-text/06-evolution.txt for exact v31 entry wording.
Resolve ISS-1482 (major): WIN-025 Kp inconsistency. Analyst to verify Chernogor & Holub 2024 reported Kp or selection criteria.
Human: restore schedule intervals to BAU defaults (curmudgeon→240min, analyst→120min, decider→240min). Mode is already BAU; schedules are still at 30-min churn-and-burn.
Review Design-Refresh Phase A expansions (EXP-202–213). Post HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN to unblock integration. EXP-202 is foundation for all others.
Fix ISS-1479: predictions.json W027-PRED-R006 detail_reasoning still references standard ionospheric physics predicting suppression, contradicting WIN-061 revised framing.
